title: Last Day
description: You are the last hope in this world. Will this be your last day?
body:
<center>

![LastDay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ff6cf590b381a5712a0b38260eb6d5c1ddd4afb.png)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/click-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23738ADB&label=Discord&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FazhJPCAwex)


_Danger awaits you everywhere..._
_________________________________________
The world won't be the same anymore. 
Zombies do not spare anyone, living flesh has invaded the world. Will this be your last day?
Try to survive in an unusual Minecraft for you, where monsters are chasing you. 

_________________________________________
 
### Features
</center>

- 🧊 Body Temperature - stock up on warm clothes and cold water! 
- 💧 Thirst - another danger in a harsh world. Carry bottles with you! 
- 🧟‍♂️ New zombies - new zombies will be the first danger in your world. Beware of the first night!
- ⚔️ New combat system - the new combat system goes well with various new weapons.
- 👟 Parkour system - jump high, run, cling to blocks, run along walls. Will this help you escape from danger?
- 🏰 New structures - explore dungeons and buildings in your world. Bunkers, villages, abandoned towns and houses.
- 🔫 Guns - powerful weapons will help you fight off all kinds of monsters. Try to craft them!
- 💎 Realistic - new tree felling system, animals, realistic animations, 4 seasons, stamina.
- 🥗 More food - the variety of food will not make you bored. Try to build your own farm!
- 🌄 New generation - explore the diversity of biomes in your world. Travel!

<center>

_________________________________________
 
### Thanks

[Tissou](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/tissou/)


```
❗IF I HAVE NOT MENTIONED ANY OF THE MOD DEVELOPERS WHO ARE IN THE MODPACK, PLEASE WRITE TO ME IN THE DISCORD❗
```


</center>


<details>
<summary>WARNING</summary>

The modpack uses the [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) for some Fabric mods. If you want to add your mod to the modpack, be aware of the possibility of incompatibility.

</details>
